71042c5b.description: PM agent — any actionable GitHub state across both repos?

checks.name: in-development-issues
checks.command: count_fe=$(gh issue list --repo sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-fe --label status:in-development --state open --json number --jq 'length') && count_be=$(gh issue list --repo sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-be --label status:in-development --state open --json number --jq 'length') && echo $(($count_fe + $count_be))

checks.name: ready-for-review-issues
checks.command: count_fe=$(gh issue list --repo sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-fe --label status:ready-for-review --state open --json number --jq 'length') && count_be=$(gh issue list --repo sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-be --label status:ready-for-review --state open --json number --jq 'length') && echo $(($count_fe + $count_be))

checks.name: changes-requested-issues
checks.command: count_fe=$(gh issue list --repo sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-fe --label status:changes-requested --state open --json number --jq 'length') && count_be=$(gh issue list --repo sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-be --label status:changes-requested --state open --json number --jq 'length') && echo $(($count_fe + $count_be))

checks.name: awaiting-human-issues
checks.command: count_fe=$(gh issue list --repo sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-fe --label status:awaiting-human --state open --json number --jq 'length') && count_be=$(gh issue list --repo sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-be --label status:awaiting-human --state open --json number --jq 'length') && echo $(($count_fe + $count_be))

checks.name: open-prs
checks.command: count_fe=$(gh pr list --repo sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-fe --state open --json number --jq 'length') && count_be=$(gh pr list --repo sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-be --state open --json number --jq 'length') && echo $(($count_fe + $count_be))

checks.name: sprint-milestone-due
checks.command: today=$(date -u +%Y-%m-%d) && gh api repos/sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-fe/milestones --jq "[.[] | select(.state == \"open\" and .due_on != null and (.due_on[:10] <= \"$today\"))] | length"

checks.name: in-sprint-stories-needing-tasks
checks.command: count_fe=$(gh issue list --repo sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-fe --label type:story --label status:in-sprint --state open --json number --jq 'length') && count_be=$(gh issue list --repo sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-be --label type:story --label status:in-sprint --state open --json number --jq 'length') && echo $(($count_fe + $count_be))

checks.name: backlog-stories-no-active-sprint
checks.command: active=$(gh api repos/sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-fe/milestones --jq '[.[] | select(.state == "open")] | length') && if [ "$active" = "0" ]; then count_fe=$(gh issue list --repo sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-fe --label type:story --label status:backlog --state open --json number --jq 'length') && count_be=$(gh issue list --repo sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-be --label type:story --label status:backlog --state open --json number --jq 'length') && echo $(($count_fe + $count_be)); else echo 0; fi
